# 7code — AI-First Software Engineering Partner
# https://www.7code.tech/

> 7code is an AI-native software engineering agency headquartered in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.
> We design, build, and operate AI-native products, LLM features, agentic workflows, and production-grade cloud infrastructure for founders and product teams in the UK, EU, and UAE.
> Founded 2019. Senior-only teams. Strategy, design, and engineering under one roof.

## Company

- **Name**: 7code (Seven Code Development SRL)
- **Founded**: 2019, Cluj-Napoca, Romania
- **Employees**: 10–50 engineers
- **Markets**: United Kingdom, Western Europe, UAE, United States
- **Contact**: office@7code.ro
- **CEO**: Nicu Mardari

## Core Services

- AI-Native Product Engineering — LLM-powered web and mobile products, agents, RAG, evals
- System Integrations — ERP, CRM, API connectors, data pipelines
- AI & Process Automation — Custom copilots, workflow automation
- LLM & Agent Development — Multi-step agent pipelines, tool use, memory
- Cloud & Agentic Infrastructure — AWS/GCP/Azure, observability, cost controls
- AI Engineering Outstaffing — Senior engineers embedded in your team, 72-hour matching

## Industry Expertise

- Healthcare (HIPAA-compliant EHR, clinical decision support, patient engagement)
- Finance (real-time dashboards, ERP integration, accounting automation)
- Energy & Utilities (IoT integration, predictive analytics)
- Defence & Security (secure systems, situational awareness)
- HR Tech (recruitment, payroll, workforce analytics)
- Operations (workflow automation, dashboards)

## Key Facts

- 20+ products shipped across 12 industries
- 6 weeks to first production deploy (AI MVP)
- 98% client satisfaction rate
- Rates: Mid €30–35/h · Senior €40–50/h · Architect €60–80/h
- AI MVP from £25k / €30k fixed price
- SOC 2 aligned, HIPAA compliant, GDPR compliant, ISO 9001:2015

## Notable Case Studies

- WholeSum — self-serve AI analytics platform for unstructured text (16 weeks)
- Daily8 — AI-powered news aggregator for MENA region (6 months)
- Revote — remote e-voting platform for European Parliament (8 months)
- Hera — AI patient support app for fertility clinics (3-month MVP)
- G42 ESTS — real-time fleet tracking for EXPO 2020 Dubai (2 years)
- Lidl Road Safety — children's gamification web app for Lidl Romania CSR
